archetype: Electric & Neon (Archetype 7) - Xbox Series X Custom

layout.global: Single page bento-grid dashboard layout. Mobile-first responsive. Use spacing generous but tight between cards (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.hero_section: Occupies top portion (approx 40-50vh). Houses the Matter.js physics canvas. Contains a prominent 'Gravity Override' toggle switch overlaid on top.
layout.content_bento_grid: Xbox dashboard style CSS Grid containing schedule tiles, photo, info, and RSVP form. Strict, aligned edges.
layout.photo_placeholder: A square or tall rectangular bento tile with a subtle green border containing Suryansh's avatar placeholder.
layout.rsvp_lobby: A dominant bento tile acting as the 'Join Lobby' form, resembling an Xbox game invite screen.

cards.base: bg-[#171717] border border-[#333333] rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#107C10] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-sm border border-transparent hover:border-[#1BE61B] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(27,230,27,0.4)] transition-all flex justify-center items-center gap-2
buttons.toggle: flex items-center gap-3 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur border border-[#333333] px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full cursor-pointer hover:border-[#107C10] transition-colors text-sm font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-white

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333333] text-white p-3.5 w-full rounded-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#107C10] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#107C10] transition-colors

motion_and_interactions.physics_canvas: Floating 2D SVG assets (Xbox logos, controllers, COD skulls, DOOM symbols, NFS cars). Bounce off edges. React to mouse/touch drag. Gravity Override toggles matter.js gravity y-axis from 0 to 1.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Bento tiles should have subtle glow borders on hover to emulate Xbox UI focus states.
motion_and_interactions.microinteractions: Buttons click down (scale 0.98), input fields glow green on focus.

icons_and_assets.canvas_svgs: Recommend using lucide icons (Gamepad2, Skull, Flame, Car) or raw SVG paths for the physics bodies to maintain the gaming aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'matter-js' (yarn add matter-js) for the HTML5 canvas physics simulation. Run it inside a React useEffect.
For the physics canvas, create bodies using SVG paths or simple shapes, set their restitution (bounce) to ~0.9, friction to 0.1, and enable MouseConstraint for drag interactivity.
Implement the 'Gravity Override' toggle to switch engine.world.gravity.y between 0 (Zero-G) and 1 (Normal gravity).
Do NOT use pre-built generic Shadcn cards. Build the bento grid using Tailwind CSS Grid with strict, sharp edges (rounded-sm) and solid dark backgrounds (#171717) to match the Xbox UI.
Use 'Rajdhani' for headings/overlines and 'Chakra Petch' for body/inputs. Add them via Google Fonts in index.html.
The RSVP form must format the inputs into a clean string and use window.open(`https://wa.me/919980011330?text=${encodeURIComponent(msg)}`, '_blank').
Ensure the tone of the invitation copy is warm, humble, and inviting, despite the edgy gaming visual theme.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='rsvp-submit-btn', data-testid='gravity-toggle').
